flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of New Haven rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($42.9k → $47.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of New Haven rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($42.9k → $47.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of New Haven fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.6% → 0.0%).
